HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

Detailed Description

Implementation for the LayeredMediaUtils class.

Definition in file LayeredMediaUtils.cpp.

Function Documentation

◆ complexSqrt()

dcmplx complexSqrt ( dcmplx arg)

Computes the square root of a complex number with proper handling of negative imaginary parts.

This function ensures correct computation of the square root for cases where the imaginary part is negative or zero to maintain consistency in branch cuts.

Parameters
argThe input complex number.
Returns
The square root of the input complex number.

◆ zgetrf_()

void zgetrf_ ( int * dim1,
int * dim2,
dcmplx * a,
int * lda,
int * ipiv,
int * info )

Computes the LU factorization of a general M-by-N matrix.

Parameters
dim1Number of rows of the matrix (for zgetrf_).
dim2Number of columns of the matrix (for zgetrf_).
aPointer to the matrix to be factored or solved.
ldaLeading dimension of the matrix.
ipivPointer to the pivot indices.
infoOutput status (0 if successful).

◆ zgetrs_()

void zgetrs_ ( char * TRANS,
int * N,
int * NRHS,
dcmplx * A,
int * LDA,
int * IPIV,
dcmplx * B,
int * LDB,
int * INFO )

Solves a system of linear equations using the LU factorization.

Parameters
TRANSSpecifies the form of the system of equations ('N' for no transpose, etc.).
NOrder of the coefficient matrix.
NRHSNumber of right-hand sides.
APointer to the LU-factored coefficient matrix.
LDALeading dimension of A.
IPIVPointer to the pivot indices from zgetrf_.
BPointer to the right-hand side vector(s).
LDBLeading dimension of B.
INFOOutput status (0 if successful).
